overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The character follows a pedestrian along a covered walkway before turning left at an intersection and crossing the street amidst light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway following a pedestrian in dark clothing ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego along the path

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian walkway with integrated lighting
large floating holographic advertisement displaying a face with 'DOKI DOKI' text
textured orange-yellow tactile paving strips running along the center of the walkway
tall street lamps with linear fluorescent lights illuminating the right side of the path
dark modern building facade with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a covered urban walkway at night. Overhead holographic billboards cast colored light onto the orange tactile paving below. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead while street lights line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and advertising

events.description: child pedestrian in red hat enters view from the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway passing the Urban Emporium storefront and various holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: child wearing a red hat walking along the left side of the path

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading 'URBAN EMPORIUM' in yellow neon letters
suspended holographic advertisement for 'AVANTE' visible on the left side
large holographic display showing a red sports car advertisement

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the covered commercial street. The Urban Emporium storefront appears on the left with bright yellow signage, while new holographic billboards replace the previous advertisements overhead. A child in a red hat walks on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with neon-lit tower and pedestrian stairs

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection revealing large cylindrical building
character turns left at the intersection toward the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection to cross the street, approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with horizontal rainbow-colored neon light rings
concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to a pedestrian overpass on the left
yellow painted crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character exits the covered walkway into a wide urban intersection. A distinctive cylindrical building with rainbow neon rings dominates the left side. The character turns left toward the crosswalk, revealing wet pavement reflections and pedestrian stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with moving traffic and graffiti walls

events.description: black SUV drives past from right to left as ego enters the crosswalk
teal sports car and white limousine pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while watching for passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection from right to left
teal sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: concrete wall with large white graffiti text reading 'NO REGRETS' and additional posters
rain-slicked asphalt road surface reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet asphalt street at the intersection, navigating between passing vehicles including a black SUV and a teal sports car. The 'NO REGRETS' graffiti wall is visible on the right, while the cylindrical neon building recedes into the background on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit urban walkway that transitions from a generic commercial path into a brightly branded shopping district. It begins with a steady walk under holographic billboards that cast vibrant colors onto orange tactile paving, following a pedestrian ahead. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a more commercial atmosphere, with the bright yellow signage of the Urban Emporium appearing on the left. The scene then evolves as new holographic advertisements replace the previous ones overhead, while a child in a red hat enters the frame on the left side of the path.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character exits a sheltered walkway and ventures into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a city intersection. It begins by emerging from the covered path into a wide urban plaza, where a cylindrical building adorned with rainbow neon rings dominates the left side of the frame. As the character turns left toward the crosswalk, the view shifts to reveal wet pavement reflecting the vibrant city lights and a set of pedestrian stairs. The scene then transitions across the asphalt street, navigating through light traffic including a black SUV and a teal sports car. Finally, the camera moves past a wall marked with NO REGRETS graffiti as the glowing cylindrical tower recedes into the background.
